title: Dashboard
subtitle: Your propfirm ROI at a glance
periodBanner: Showing {{period}} ({{range}}). Switch the period to compare ranges.

netPnl.title: Net P&L
netPnl.hintBestMonthSoFar: This is your best month so far
netPnl.hintOnlyMonth: Your only tracked month so far
netPnl.hintRanked: This is your {{ordinal}} best month so far
netPnl.hintNoActivityMonth: No activity recorded for this month
netPnl.hintNoActivityYear: No activity recorded for this year

totalSpent.title: Total spent
totalSpent.badgeTooltip: Average cost per attempt (evaluations + resets) in this period.

totalPayouts.title: Total payouts (net)
totalPayouts.badgeTooltip: Average net amount per payout in this period.

fundingRatio.title: Funding ratio
fundingRatio.badgeTooltipAbove: Your lifetime funding ratio across all attempts. You're above your baseline this period.
fundingRatio.badgeTooltipBelow: Your lifetime funding ratio across all attempts. You're below your baseline this period.

payoutRatio.title: Payout ratio
payoutRatio.badgeTooltipAbove: Your lifetime payout ratio across all attempts. You're above your baseline this period.
payoutRatio.badgeTooltipBelow: Your lifetime payout ratio across all attempts. You're below your baseline this period.

flowChart.title: Daily flow
flowChart.description: Fees and payouts by day, with cumulative net P&L over the selected period

shareCard.dialogDescription: Download this card to share on X or Instagram.
shareCard.iosHint: Long-press the image to save to your Photos.
shareCard.error: We couldn't generate the image. Please try again.

leaderboard.title: Propfirms by ROI
leaderboard.description: Net P&L per propfirm in the selected period. Sorted best to worst.

empty.title: No activity in this period
empty.description: Once you have evaluations, funded accounts, or payouts in the selected period, propfirms will rank here.

noData.title: No data yet
noData.description: Track your first propfirm evaluation to see funding ratio, net P&L, and monthly flow come to life.

noPeriodActivity.title: No activity in this period
noPeriodActivity.description: Pick a wider range to see your data, or log some activity to start filling it in.
